queries.question: Show autobiographies and historical accounts from the 19th century.
queries.sql:
SELECT Narratives.title 
FROM NarrativeForms JOIN Narratives ON NarrativeForms.id = Narratives.narrative_form_id JOIN Epochs ON Narratives.epoch_id = Epochs.id
WHERE (NarrativeForms.Narrative_Form = "Autobiography" OR NarrativeForms.Narrative_Form = "Historical Account") AND Epochs.Epoch = "19th Century"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?narrativeforms a :NarrativeForms .
  ?narratives a :Narratives .
  ?narratives p:hasNarrativeForms ?narrativeforms .
  ?epochs a :Epoch .
  ?narratives p:hasEpochs ?epochs .
  ?narratives p:title ?title .
  ?narrativeforms p:Narrative_Form ?narrative_form_w .
  ?narrativeforms p:Narrative_Form ?narrative_form_w2 .
  ?epochs p:Epoch ?epoch_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?narrative_form_w) = "Autobiography" || STR(?narrative_form_w2) = "Historical Account")) && STR(?epoch_w) = "19th Century"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show autobiographies and historical accounts from the 19th century.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  high: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?narrativeforms a :NarrativeForms .
  ?narratives a :Narratives .
  ?narratives p:hasNarrativeForms ?narrativeforms .
  ?epochs a :Epoch .
  ?narratives p:hasEpochs ?epochs .
  ?narratives p:title ?title .
  ?narrativeforms p:Narrative_Form ?narrative_form_w .
  ?narrativeforms p:Narrative_Form ?narrative_form_w2 .
  ?epochs p:Epoch ?epoch_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?narrative_form_w) = "Autobiography" || STR(?narrative_form_w2) = "Historical Account")) && STR(?epoch_w) = "19th Century"))
} }
  low: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?narrativeforms a :NarrativeForms .
  ?narratives a :Narratives .
  ?narratives p:hasNarrativeForms ?narrativeforms .
  ?epochs a :Epoch .
  ?narratives p:hasEpochs ?epochs .
  ?narratives p:title ?title .
  ?narrativeforms p:Narrative_Form ?narrative_form_w .
  ?narrativeforms p:Narrative_Form ?narrative_form_w2 .
  ?epochs p:Epoch ?epoch_w .
  FILTER((STR(?narrative_form_w) = "Autobiography" || (STR(?narrative_form_w2) = "Historical Account" && STR(?epoch_w) = "19th Century")))
} }
}
